CREATE TABLE vectors (id UInt32, vector Tuple(Float64, Float64));
SELECT id, L1Normalize(vector) AS unit_vector FROM vectors WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, L1Normalize((x, y)) FROM (SELECT 5 AS x, -5 AS y) AS temp;
SELECT id, L1Normalize((SUM(x), AVG(y))) FROM (SELECT vector.1 AS x, vector.2 AS y FROM vectors) GROUP BY id;
SELECT L1Normalize((x, y)) FROM (SELECT vector.1 AS x, vector.2 AS y FROM vectors WHERE id = 2) AS temp;
SELECT id, L1Normalize((vector.1, vector.2)) AS normalized FROM (SELECT * FROM vectors) AS derived;
SELECT id, (L1Normalize(vector)).1 AS x_norm, (L1Normalize(vector)).2 AS y_norm FROM vectors;
SELECT L1Normalize((1, 0)) AS unit_vector, L1Normalize((0, 1)) AS unit_vector_y;
SELECT L1Normalize((-5, 5)) AS normalized_vector FROM (SELECT id, vector FROM vectors WHERE id = 4) AS subquery;
